description_long: This storage box is constructed from dark, textured wood planks, giving it a rustic and robust appearance. The sides feature horizontal wood grain patterns and subtle carved details, suggesting hand-crafted assembly. The box is open at the top, with thick, reinforced wooden edges forming a sturdy frame around the opening. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, and the surface is unadorned, lacking any labels or signage. The wood appears untreated or only lightly finished, with a matte, slightly rough surface. Its size and build suggest it is suitable for storing tools, supplies, or miscellaneous items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or outdoor spaces.
description: A dark, wooden storage box with a rustic, plank-textured design and an open top, featuring thick reinforced edges and no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wood grain texture and horizontal plank pattern, with a prominent open top and thick frame.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the same plank texture and open top, with slight variation in wood grain.
description_view_2: Another side view with similar features, showing consistent wood texture and open top, minor differences in plank alignment.
description_view_3: Back view displays the same construction and texture, with the wood grain slightly less pronounced but otherwise matching the other sides.
